## Pull Request checklist

Please fill out the sections below to help reviewers understand and verify your change.

### Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why (one or two short paragraphs).

### Related issues

- Related issue(s) (if any):

### Type of change

- [ ] Bugfix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling
- [ ] Performance

### How to test / reproduce

Describe steps to reproduce the behavior or how to exercise the change locally. Include commands, environment, or example content.

### Screenshots / examples

If this PR changes UI or visual output, add screenshots or GIFs.

### Checklist (before requesting review)

- [ ] I performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I ran linters and formatting (`gofmt`, `prettier`, `eslint` where applicable)
- [ ] I ran tests locally (if present) and they pass
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant (README, CONTRIBUTING, or in-code docs)
- [ ] I verified there are no large generated files or secrets in this PR
- [ ] CI builds are passing (or failures are unrelated to this change)

### Deployment notes

Any special instructions required for deployment or migration (e.g., Hugo module updates, Go module changes, environment variables).

### Reviewers / Assignees

Please suggest reviewers or mention maintainers who should review this PR.

---

Thank you for your contribution! A maintainer will review and provide feedback.
